name: Dessert Cafés
audience: Dessert café owners, waffles and crepes businesses, late-night dessert spots
pain_points: Sticky, saucy desserts need leak-proof containers
Late-night trade means high weekend volumes
Wide variety of dessert types requires multiple packaging formats
compliance_concerns: Natasha's Law allergen labelling (nuts, dairy, gluten)
HFSS display restrictions for high-sugar products
